content:
[Previous conversation summary] # Conversation Summary ## Context PRIME STORE men's fashion store with AI agent Gabriela. Continued optimization of response templates, product information, and testing procedures. ## Key Decisions & Configurations ### 1. **Standardized Link Response Template - APPROVED & IMPLEMENTED (Option C)** - **Decision:** User approved full standardization (update existing + create rule for future) - **Created:** `workspace/memory/strategy/link-response-template.md` with universal template - **Updated Products:** Óculos (R$ 159,90), New Balance 9060 (R$ 399 PIX), Sandália Gucci (R$ 319 PIX), Catálogo Tênis (R$ 229+) - **Template format:** ``` [Product] a partir de R$ [price] [emoji] 🔗 Segue o link dos modelos: [complete URL] Me envia a foto ou nome do modelo que te passo o valor certinho! 😊 ``` ### 2. **New Balance 9060 Duplicate Response Issue - FIXED** - **Problem:** Gabriela sent TWO different responses (old format + new format) for same product - **Root cause:** Conflicting information in `knowledge/pricing.md` vs updated product info - **Solution:** Updated `workspace/memory/knowledge/pricing.md` to use new standardized template - **Result:** Now sends only ONE consistent response ### 3. **Diesel Brand Information - ADDED** - **Created files:** - `workspace/memory/knowledge/diesel-brand.md` (brand history, differentials, characteristics) - `workspace/memory/strategy/diesel-sales-script.md` (sales script, qualifying questions) - **Brand positioning:** Italian premium brand, modern fit, differentiated washes, high-end finishing - **Response tone:** Modern, seller-oriented, natural (not technical) - **Mandatory link format:** "🔗 Segue o link dos modelos:" (exact phrase required) - **Qualifying questions:** Model preference, size, style (slim/skinny/straight) ### 4. **Lupo Brand vs Product Availability - CLARIFIED** - **Brand info exists:** History (founded 1921), differentials, brand positioning - **Products available:** Calvin Klein and Tommy Hilfiger underwear ONLY - **Lupo products:** NOT available in stock - **Pricing:** R$ 30 (unit) / R$ 100 (4-pack combo) for CK/Tommy - **Awaiting clarification:** Whether to add Lupo products or keep brand info as reference only ### 5. **Testing Recommendations - PROVIDED** - **User request:** Test Gabriela fresh without old conversation data - **Recommendation:** Use Agent Testing Mode (
@Gabriela
) instead of deleting conversations - **Reason:** Preserves valuable data (sales history, follow-ups, client patterns) while allowing isolated testing - **Alternative:** Create test contact on WhatsApp ## Files Modified ### Created: - `workspace/memory/strategy/link-response-template.md` - Universal link response template - `workspace/memory/knowledge/diesel-brand.md` - Diesel brand information - `workspace/memory/strategy/diesel-sales-script.md` - Diesel sales script ### Updated: - `workspace/memory/knowledge/pricing.md` - New Balance 9060 (removed old format, added standardized template) - `workspace/memory/knowledge/product-info.md` - New Balance 9060, Sandália Gucci, Tênis catálogo (standardized formats) ## Pending Actions - User to clarify Lupo product availability (add products with pricing OR keep as brand reference only) - User to test Gabriela using recommended testing mode ## Automated Systems - Follow-up monitoring continues running every 5 minutes (no inactive clients detected during session) ## Outcome - ✅ Response template standardization complete across all major products - ✅ Duplicate response issue resolved - ✅ Diesel brand successfully integrated with sales strategy - ✅ Testing framework explained without data loss risk - ⏳ Lupo product decision pending
